title: デビュー戦の後に・まだ見ぬ景色へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka makes her race debut without any
trouble.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you.
choice_data_list: Are you happy with your performance?
Are you happy with your performance?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Not really.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I know there are more difficult races to come.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm looking forward to them.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Together...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No, you're right. We're in this together.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But, well... I guess it does feel a little strange...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I certainly hope so.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: We'll be running in many races together, after all.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes... I'll be counting on you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzukaaa!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on your debut! You were super
cool out there!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, Spe... I don't know if I'd say super.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello! You're Suzuka's trainer, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm Suzuka's roomie, Special Week! I've heard all
about you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
She says you're super nice and let her do things
her own way!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I-I didn't say it like that!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sorry! That's pretty much the gist though, right?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That might be the case, but still!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so my journey with Silence Suzuka, who loves
running more than anyone else, begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to make sure she's able to run in all the
races she needs in order to achieve her goal!
